title: MOM'S BIRTHDAY — cake + candles
prompt: twinkling fairy lights along the mantel, warm lamp glow. Soft warm interior of a first home — cozy apartment, birthday balloons in pastels, small round table with chocolate birthday cake topped with lit candles. @young_Mama sitting at the table, hands CLASPED in front of cake, mouth EXHALES SOFTLY at the lit candles. @young_Papa standing behind her left shoulder, watching with adoring smile. A small ribbon-wrapped gift box sits on the table next to the cake. Lips PURSE, BLOWS softly across the cake. The candles FLICKER and one by one go out. Right hand from behind GENTLY PICKS UP the gift box and slides it forward. The box has soft holes on top, slight movement inside. young_Papa (warm, soft): "Make a wish." Absolutely NO dialogue, NO voices, NO speech in any language. Only soft music and ambient sound effects (footsteps, leaves, distant traffic). NO foreign-language babble.
